markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, review process, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Review Bottleneck:** The 35-minute review time per article is unsustainable. GrowthX will use Franki's detailed feedback to refine its AI pipeline, focusing on adding the crucial "so what" context to paragraphs.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**New "Versus" Series:** A high-priority project to create comparison articles (e.g., "HX vs. Federado") will launch. Franki will lead a Tuesday meeting with PMM (Chris, Mehmet) to provide the deep product context needed for this series.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**PSEO Strategy:** Jakub presented \~12 programmatic SEO (PSEO) opportunities. The team will prioritize 2–3 MVPs to test and learn before scaling, balancing SEO potential with HX product alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [**"Document" Verb Ban:** The AI is overusing "document" as a verb, making content sound unnatural. This will be added to GrowthX's style guide to ensure a more human tone.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [**Problem:** The current review process is too slow. One article took 35 minutes to review, an unsustainable pace for the 11 articles in Franki's queue.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** Paragraphs often lack a clear "so what" statement, leaving sentences feeling disconnected.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=179.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will use Franki's detailed comments as training data for its AI pipeline to improve content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [**Context:** Refresher articles, which have a lighter-touch pipeline focused on stat updates and tone adjustments, are expected to be much faster to review.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### New "Versus" Content Series

  - [**Goal:** Create a series of high-value comparison articles (e.g., "HX vs. Federado") to capture low-funnel search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
    1.  [**Input:** Product Marketing (PMM) will provide comparison grids and product context.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
    2.  [**Output:** GrowthX will write editorial articles that include a comparison table.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Action Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**GrowthX:** Create a sample article with existing info to identify knowledge gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
      - [**Franki:** Lead a Tuesday meeting with PMM (Chris, Mehmet) to provide the necessary context.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### PSEO (Programmatic SEO) Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Use AI to identify and scale programmatic content opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [**Method:** Jakub used a custom GPT, fed with HX personas and product docs, to generate \~12 PSEO ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [**Prioritization Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Business Alignment:** How well the topic aligns with HX products.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**SEO Impact:** Keyword potential, difficulty, and competition.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
      - [**Original Content:** Availability of internal data or artifacts to enrich the content (e.g., Jamie Wilson's session transcripts).](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)
  - [**Next Step:** The team will review Jakub's document to select 2–3 MVP ideas for a small-batch test before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Editorial Content & Themes

  - [**Specialized Market Segments:** Franki proposed creating foundational content on specific lines of business (e.g., aviation insurance) to address a sales team need.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Rationale:** While keyword volume is low, these topics are high-intent and build authority.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [**Decision:** This will be explored as a future PSEO opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [**Software Listicles:** Jakub recommended prioritizing "best of" and "alternatives" listicles as a fast way to build a base of low-funnel content.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

      - [Email Franki a list of proposed "versus" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
      - [Create a sample "versus" article to identify knowledge gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [**Franki:**](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Schedule the Tuesday "versus" content meeting with PMM (Chris, Mehmet).](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Share any existing PMM comparison documents with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**David & Franki:**](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
      - [Review Jakub's PSEO document to prioritize 2–3 MVP ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/_zBuToJ3-J1ZHRTRQ_rQEU1Sv7GN9mJz?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
